Fragrance bar + candle studio

The experience

A cleaner path from “that sounds fun” to “we’re booked.”

This mockup turns the current big blocks of information into scannable decision points: what guests make, how long it takes, what it costs, where to go, and why booking now is easy.

Blend, pour, label, and take home.

Guests understand the activity instantly without digging through a long FAQ.

Over 100 scents

Build a signature blend.

Choose fragrance notes, test combinations, and create something personal enough to feel like a keepsake.

More than candles

Give guests options.

Candles, reed diffusers, wax melts, room and body mists, perfume rollerballs, car diffusers, soaps, lotions, scrubs, and bubble bath.

Group-friendly

Perfect for casual plans and celebrations.

Date nights, birthdays, showers, team events, family outings, girls’ day, and private parties all get a clearer path to book.

How it works

Four simple steps. No mystery. No scrolling hunt.

Visitors should know exactly what they’re signing up for before they click. Simple sequencing lowers hesitation and makes the Book Now button feel obvious.

Pick a location.

Vintage Park or Lakeland Village, with clear phone numbers and addresses.

Choose a time.

Walk in anytime, or reserve a spot for weekends, holidays, and groups.

Blend your scent.

Explore fragrance notes and create a custom blend with help from the team.

Pour and enjoy.

Most visits take 30–45 minutes. Candles set in about 90 minutes.

Private events

Turn the candle bar into the easiest group plan in town.

Private parties, birthdays, showers, fundraisers, team events, weddings, scent-your-business, and mobile experiences can all route through one cleaner booking flow.

Plan a Group Event
Parties of 8+ Clear event paths help groups understand what to expect before they inquire.
Upsells built in Products, vessels, add-ons, pickup reminders, and special occasions can be surfaced naturally.
Better follow-up Capture the customer journey and keep guests connected after the visit.
Less drop-off The popup keeps booking on-page instead of pushing guests into a clunky detour.
What guests can make

Make the options easy to scan.

Instead of burying the product menu in paragraphs, show the core categories with the guest benefit first.

✦

Custom candles

The classic Foxfire experience: blend, pour, label, and pick up after the candle sets.

☾

Home fragrance

Reed diffusers, wax melts, car diffusers, and room mists for guests who want scent without a flame.

♢

Body + gift items

Perfume rollerballs, lotions, sugar scrubs, hand soap, bubble bath, and take-home kits.

Locations

Two locations, zero confusion.

Each location gets its own clear booking path in the popup, so guests do not have to decode separate links or wonder if they picked the right store.

Vintage Park

Foxfire Candle Works — Vintage Park

122 Vintage Park Blvd, Suite C
Houston, TX 77070

Call or text: 832-458-5392
Email: info@foxfirecandleworks.com

Beer and wine available for purchase. Food allowed during private parties.

Lakeland Village

Foxfire Candle Works — Lakeland Village

10611 Fry Rd Suite B2-100
Cypress, TX 77433

Call or text: 346-592-4783
Email: info@foxfirecandleworks.com

Small bites like charcuterie or cupcakes are welcome. Bring napkins and utensils.

Powered by Singenuity

Let guests book without breaking the mood.

The same Book Now button can open a polished popup or route directly to Singenuity. Either way, the booking flow is built to reduce friction, improve conversion, and track the customer journey more clearly.
